title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: lightweight, extensible framework for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma & other LLMs locally on macOS, Linux & Windows with a single CLI.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list & delete models via simple async/sync client.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration: use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat node in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed “Open WebUI”); supports RAG, multi-user, model pulls.

title: ollama-hack
summary: Community-curated list of hacks, tools & experiments built on top of Ollama.

title: ollama-copilots
summary: Collection of IDE copilot plugins (VS Code, IntelliJ) that route to local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Unofficial Nim wrapper around Ollama’s REST API for native Nim applications.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama: chat & generate with native Ruby objects.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client (Maven) with Spring Boot starters and reactive wrappers.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-to-run docker-compose stacks with Ollama, Open WebUI, Postgres & GPU support.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive CLI chat wrapper with markdown rendering, conversation history & prompt templates.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that pipes selected notes to local Ollama models for summarization & Q&A.

title: ollama-rag-stack
summary: Minimal RAG starter using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + FastAPI for PDF question-answering.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with any pulled Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-model-library
summary: Community-curated Modelfile recipes (CodeLlama, SQLCoder, Zephyr) with benchmarks & notes.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for private or channel-wide LLM interactions.

title: ollama-experiments
summary: Jupyter notebooks exploring function-calling, vision models & fine-tuning workflows with Ollama.
